programme.title: Rookie Blue: Surprises
programme.desc: After six months working undercover, Andy and Nick’s operation goes sideways when Nick, then Andy go missing. Meanwhile, a random arrest at 15 Division puts Sam Swarek and the other officers in the middle of the investigation-turned-rescue-mission

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Homecoming
programme.desc: On her first day back at 15 Division, Andy must work with Swarek to track down an ex convict determined to get his old life back at any cost. Andy realizes just how much has changed since she walked away from her old life six months ago

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Different, Not Better
programme.desc: Andy is partnered with Swarek’s new girlfriend, Officer Marlo Cruz. When they come face-to-face with an out of control EDP [Emotionally Disturbed Person], their differences are put to the test and one of them has to pull the trigger.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: The Kids Are Not Alright
programme.desc: Andy has her sights set on a much-needed long weekend. But when a routine highway check leads to the discovery of a teenage boy in the trunk of a car, Andy and Gail must convince him that no heartache lasts forever

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Poison Pill
programme.desc: After a messy drug arrest, Andy and Marlo are quarantined together. Meanwhile, 15 Division springs into emergency response mode in order to get the contaminated drugs off the streets before a deadly outbreak sweeps through the city.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Skeletons
programme.desc: When a young woman is reported missing, the officers of 15 Division soon discover a possible copycat connection to one of their division’s most distressing cases. With the clock ticking, Gail must face her worst fears..

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Friday the 13th
programme.desc: When human bones found in a ravine open up a 15-year-old missing persons case, Swarek reunites with his old training officer to solve the case

programme.title: Rookie Blue: For Better, For Worse
programme.desc: Everyone at 15 Division, especially Andy, just wants a quick, smooth shift so they can get to Frank and Noelle’s wedding. But things get complicated when they get called to a hijacked casino bus full of senior citizens

programme.title: Rookie Blue: What I Lost
programme.desc: When Chris returns for a visit, his reunion takes a shocking turn when his son, Christian, is abducted while under the care of Andy and Nick

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Are Here
programme.desc: Near the end of shift, 15 Division busts a marijuana grow-op – a case that becomes Traci’s first homicide and forces Andy, Nick and Gail to work overtime

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deception
programme.desc: When a suspected pedophile is found beaten within an inch of his life, Andy discovers Marlo has been conducting a mania-fueled, off-hours “investigation”

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Under Fire
programme.desc: After Andy and Chloe take fire from an unseen shooter, the officers realize they are the targets of someone with a grudge against 15 Division

programme.title: Rookie Blue: You Can See the Stars
programme.desc: In the wake of a targeted attack on the officers of 15 Division (ep. 412), Andy, Swarek, and their fellow officers have to piece together the truth about a past crime in order to find Oliver Shaw – in time to save his life

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Blink
programme.desc: In the aftermath of the night’s traumatic events, Andy and Dov try to pull themselves together at an all-night diner, but are caught off-duty and off-guard in a volatile diner hold-up.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: All by Her Selfie
programme.desc: Oliver gets promoted and Andy is tasked with training 15 Division’s newest rookie, Duncan Moore. But when Andy and Duncan respond to a messy homicide at a pawnshop, it’s clear this rookie is going to give Andy the challenge of a lifetime.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Heart Breakers, Money Makers
programme.desc: When Andy and Nick’s seizure at an illegal gambling house leads to a suspicious confession, Andy recruits Sam to help figure out who’s lying, why, and where the money is, before anyone gets hurt.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Wanting
programme.desc: When a tenement-building shooting leads to the discovery of an executed gang leader, 15 Division must race to find the killer before a gang war breaks out

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Going Under
programme.desc: When 15 Division goes undercover at a club-land bar that’s a possible hub for illegal handguns, Chris’s erratic behavior and concern for a specific drug dealer make Dov suspicious.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Two Truths and a Lie
programme.desc: As the officers of 15 Division try to hunt down the killer of Brian Gowdy – Andy and Sam go on the road to interview a list of inmates at Millburn Penitentiary.

programme.title: Rookie Blue: Deal with the Devil
programme.desc: In the midst of a chaotic day at the station, Oliver prepares Andy to defend herself at Duncan’s dismissal hearing, now happening two hours from now

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: A chef (Jon Favreau) quits his job at a prestigious Los Angeles restaurant and starts a food-truck business in Miami with his ex-wife (Sofía Vergara), his best friend (John Leguizamo) and his son.

programme.title: She's Funny That Way
programme.desc: The cast and crew of a Broadway play are thrown into a romantic roundelay when a lecherous director (Owen Wilson) hires a hooker-turned-actress (Imogen Poots) to star alongside his wife (Kathryn Hahn) and his wife's ex-lover (Rhys Ifans).

programme.title: Lay the Favorite
programme.desc: A former stripper's (Rebecca Hall) talent with numbers lands her a job with a professional gambler (Bruce Willis) who runs a sports book in Las Vegas.

programme.title: Chef
programme.desc: A chef (Jon Favreau) quits his job at a prestigious Los Angeles restaurant and starts a food-truck business in Miami with his ex-wife (Sofía Vergara), his best friend (John Leguizamo) and his son.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After snitching on the mob, a Mafia boss (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a sleepy town in France, but their insistence on resorting to their old habits places them in danger from vengeful cronies.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: A ghostlike crime fighter (Gabriel Macht) faces a villain known as the Octopus (Samuel L. Jackson), whose aim is to destroy Central City while searching for the secret to immortality.

programme.title: Sin City: A Dame to Kill For
programme.desc: In the central story, Dwight McCarthy (Josh Brolin) struggles with his inner demons and tries to maintain control until his former lover, Ava Lord (Eva Green), returns wanting his help to escape her abusive husband.

programme.title: The Family
programme.desc: After snitching on the mob, a Mafia boss (Robert De Niro) and his family enter the Witness Protection Program and relocate to a sleepy town in France, but their insistence on resorting to their old habits places them in danger from vengeful cronies.

programme.title: The Spirit
programme.desc: A ghostlike crime fighter (Gabriel Macht) faces a villain known as the Octopus (Samuel L. Jackson), whose aim is to destroy Central City while searching for the secret to immortality.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After flashbacks of an alien abduction lead him to attempt suicide, Eddie Wexler (Michael O'Keefe) is institutionalized, with a doctor who seems intent on forcing him to relive his memories. Is Eddie insane? Or is the doctor more than he seems?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: As he celebrates his first anniversary, Norman (Matt Frewer) thinks he's the luckiest man alive. But suddenly, his lovely wife doesn't seem the same and he can't stand to be around her. Is he going crazy or are his instincts telling him something?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Problem child Rusty (Ryan Phillippe) finds himself thrown into a private school bent on straightening him out with some unorthodox methods. Rusty has eluded their control so far, but can he escape from this prison of the mind?

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: On the first day of his presidency, Charles Halsey (Robert Foxworth) is faced with the first galactic foreign policy decision. As aliens are approaching Earth, the peace-loving president must determine if they are invaders or benevolent explorers.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: In a bizarre twist of fate, Nancy McDonald (Bonnie Bedelia) receives a distress call from Lindy (Chad Willett), a former lover, who was lost in space twenty years earlier. And he has a message: He's alive…and he desperately needs her help.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A man (James Wilder) finds himself in what seems to be a refuge in a post-apocalyptic world, lorded over by a sadistic industrialist (M. Emmet Walsh) who pits his guests against one another for enjoyment...but all is not what it seems to be.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Howie (Neil Patrick Harris), a boy with intellectual disabilities, is the last unaffected person in a town overrun by a strange, parasitic madness. On his own for the first time, Howie has only himself to rely upon if he wants to save his sister!

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a friend's betrayal cost him his Army career, Lee Taylor (Costas Mandylor) helps a self-styled militia Major hijack an Army shipment. Expecting missiles, they find a mysterious cargo and a lone Army Guard who warns of its deadly capability.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Convicted of a murder he didn't commit, Linden Stiles can either accept execution or become the subject of a military experiment. Choosing to live, he finds himself slowly dehumanized by the alien DNA that has been injected into him.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: With Earth under alien rule, humanity has been programmed into slavery. A band of rebels kidnaps Evan (Erich Anderson), one of the alien leader's slaves. After a twist of fate, Evan agrees to assassinate his former master...with devastating results.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When three young women age and die within hours, a small town is turned upside down. How does Helen (Maxine Miller), a doctor's aging mother, play into these deaths? The answer to the puzzling mystery of fragile youth is soon to be revealed.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: On a desperate mission to survive, a young military cadet (Will Wheaton) learns the difference between heroic ideals and the bitter realities of war as he and his dying comrades prepare a strike against the aliens who may have condemned them to death.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: What really happens during an out-of-body experience? Scientist Rebecca (Peri Gilpin) is so desperate to find out that she decides run an experiment on herself. But not everyone is happy with the lengths science will go to for empirical proof.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: Inventor Dr. Jack Henson (David Hyde Pierce) comes up with a virtual prison where criminals serve a life sentence in just a few, cost-efficient hours. When an innocent man's life is at stake, the doctor must submit himself to his own invention.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A mentally challenged man (Howie Mandel) is made more intelligent by a machine that transfers people's memories and experiences into his head, but kills its victims. And he soon discovers that the mind can be a minefield in The Outer Limits.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a couple's son dies, an experimental procedure harvests the boy's nerve cells, allowing the mother to give birth to a genetically identical child. But soon it becomes clear that this fetus is not just identical…it is actually Justin himself.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: A man's family is turned upside down when he discovers that his son's college sweetheart is the same woman he rescued from a secret military experiment twenty years before...only she has not aged a day since. Peter Onorati and Fred Savage star.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: When the Stream -- an artificial system providing information to all society members through computer chips implanted in their brains -- begins to malfunction, an unlikely, primitive man (George Newbern) may be mankind's only hope.

programme.title: The Outer Limits: 1995
programme.desc: After a chemical war renders the world's population unable to conceive healthy children, a mother and father must escape from a sinister government agency intent on using their miraculously healthy newborn to repopulate the species.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: NASA has been exploring space for decades, and there are persistent reports that the agency has uncovered surprising information about UFOs.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Friendship Case - The Extraordinary Story of Mass Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary explores the extraordinary story of mass alien contact that has been kept secret for half a century.

programme.title: UFOTV Presents: The Secret: Evidence We Are Not Alone
programme.desc: This story and the trail of scientific discovery that followed proves that the official US government position on UFOs has been, and still is, a carefully orchestrated deception designed to hide the most extraordinary secret in recorded history.

programme.title: Aliens Among Us: The Michael Wolf Theory
programme.desc: Michael K. Wolf shares 30 years of insights on UFOs, aliens, government projects, and crop circles.

programme.title: The Hills' Abduction : The Zeta Reticuli Incident
programme.desc: Barney & Betty Hill's abduction and the Zeta reticuli incident explored.

programme.title: Aliens In USSR
programme.desc: Unsolved Soviet Union Alien Mysteries: Dyatlov Pass incident, Petrozavodsk miracle, Voronezh case. Amaze and frighten, but doubt of alien involvement.

programme.title: The Falcon Lake Incident
programme.desc: Aliens visit Earth often; Canada's 1967 Falcon Lake UFO incident stands out. Canada's frequent sightings make it enigmatic.

programme.title: UFO Conspiracies: The Hidden Truth
programme.desc: This documentary charts the US government's involvement with UFO phenomenon from 1947 to the present day. Featuring rare classified footage, expert interviews, cover-ups and the revelation of a secret 20 million dollar UFO research program.

programme.title: Dulce Base: The New Illuminati
programme.desc: Dulce, New Mexico is a hotspot for mysterious phenomena and alleged secret military collaboration between humans and aliens.

programme.title: Alien Crash at Roswell
programme.desc: The most enigmatic UFO incident in history exposed. Join Philip Coppens, star of History Channel's "Ancient Aliens" series in this and unprecedented expose on the Roswell Incident revealing that there is much more to this case than previously believed.

programme.title: Linda Napolitano: The Alien Abduction of the Century
programme.desc: Linda Napolitano's 1989 alien abduction is the abduction case of the century.

programme.title: Crop Circle Realities
programme.desc: Exploring over a thousand crop circles worldwide, this documentary uncovers stunning designs and a possible extraterrestrial link—revealing hidden truths and realities behind one of the most mysterious UFO phenomena on Earth.

programme.title: Close Encounters: Proof of Alien Contact
programme.desc: This documentary examines whether UFOs are real. It studies over 250 amateur video clips, evaluates several recent revelations about Roswell, and examines footage of the removal of an alien implant.

programme.title: UFO Hunters
programme.desc: On April 19, 1897, the Dallas Morning News reported a mysterious airship had crashed into a windmill in the nearby town of Aurora, Texas.

programme.title: Alien Contact: Secret Societies
programme.desc: Thousands of years ago a special, genetically advanced race of beings came to Earth. They were seen as Gods by primitive man and worshipped. They set themselves apart.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles III: Turtles In Time
programme.desc: When April O'Neil discovers an ancient sceptre with magical powers, the turtles must cow-a-bunga their way back to 17th century Japan to rescue her.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles
programme.desc: In this live-action movie feature, Shredder has returned to cause more mayhem by kidnapping the rat Ninja Master. But the Turtles have been armed with Professor Perry's antidote and, with the help of a journalist, set out to save the Ninja Master.

programme.title: Teenage Mutant Ninja Turtles II: The Secret of the Ooze
programme.desc: Turtles are up to their shells in trouble in the second full-length original movie when a canister of toxic ooze falls into the hands of the Shredder!

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Dave heads to West Yorkshire to collect a rare 1926 Dodge bus. Derek gets his hands on a rare Vauxhall Victor VX 90 police car that is expected to sell for more than a few coppers.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Derek heads to Scotland during a large rainstorm to pick up a Jaguar E-type and a rare MGC convertible, meanwhile Dave extracts a rare Austin Gipsey from a lock up.

programme.title: Bangers & Cash: Live
programme.desc: Highlights of a special event featuring an in-person auction. Derek and Dave aim to get the right price for a 1958 Jaguar XK 150, and there's a bidding war for a 1975 Yamaha Fizzy.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A beautiful looking sports car has been fooling the punters and intriguing Derek. It's a Challenger E-Type, a fibreglass replica created from an E-Type mould.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: A near-perfect 50s Chevy panel van and a very desirable low-mileage 80s Brooklands Capri tempt auctioneer Derek out of Yorkshire.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: Four VW camper vans pitch up at the auction house looking for a new home and Derek picks up an Austin 16 that goes like stink and has some unusual modern modifications.

programme.title: Bangers and Cash
programme.desc: There's real Yorkshire drama when Derek auctions off some vehicles that were used in the TV show Heartbeat. There's love for an Austin Cambridge and sporty Italian number finds a new home.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Siddy Holloway has unique access to the underground stations, as she is taking Tim Dunn to the 273rd station, West Ashfield.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore a station in the beating heart of London's theatre land.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to the sprawling Heathrow Airport underground stations, the first ever underground rail link between an airport and a city.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to London's iconic Camden Town station, a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore South Kensington, home of the Victoria and Albert Museum, the Science Museum and the Natural History Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy head to Dover Street, now known as Green Park. During the Second World War, the abandoned passageways and lift shafts of the original station had an incredible second life as the base for the London Passenger Transport Board.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim and Siddy head to Dover Street, now known as Green Park. During the Second World War, the abandoned passageways and lift shafts of the original station had an incredible second life as the base for the London Passenger Transport Board.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway embark on a night-time track walk to the abandoned station of British Museum.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Siddy Holloway has unique access to the underground stations, as she is taking Tim Dunn to the 273rd station, West Ashfield.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway explore a station in the beating heart of London's theatre land.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to the sprawling Heathrow Airport underground stations, the first ever underground rail link between an airport and a city.

programme.title: Secrets of the London Underground
programme.desc: Tim Dunn and Siddy Holloway head to London's iconic Camden Town station, a labyrinthine junction on the Northern Line.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Caroline treats a father of four with severe pancreatitis, Rhona restores her patient's health with a large blood transfusion, and Sarah cares for a mum with incurable stomach cancer.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Three young newly-qualified twenty-something nurses, Renee, Caitlin and James, cope with the pressures of working for the National Health Service and finding the right work-life balance.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Paediatric nurse, Mahbuba treats a girl with a brain tumour, Caroline must save the life of a patient with COVID-19, who is also 29-weeks pregnant, and Matron Hazera responds to an emergency alarm.

programme.title: Nurses on the Ward
programme.desc: Paediatric nurse Mahbuba deals with an emergency in the form of a a baby who can't breathe, Rebecca treats a deaf cardiac patient, and military nurse Scott cares for a struggling asthmatic.

programme.desc: As Halloween approaches, Matron Hazera has a staffing nightmare, ED Matron Steph meets an abusive patient in police custody, and Amy helps deliver premature identical twins via c-section.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When June volunteers to look after a neighbour's dog for a week, Terry discovers that a man's best friend can often prove fickle.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Only Terry could buy a new car and lose it the same night, but his troubles don't end there! More classic fun with the bungling suburbanites. What would Sir Dennis make of it all?

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry manages to remember June's birthday for once, and then wishes he hadn't - getting her present turns out to be so complicated it almost ruins their marriage.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry's nephew Alan threatens to eat the Medfords out of house and home.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Rumours of redundancies at work make Terry particularly conscious of his image. With the annual office dance in mind, he and June decide to take disco-dancing lessons.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: In this episode, the couple are moving to Purley but plan to redecorate the house before moving in - until they learn of the sinister reputation of their new home.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: When it comes to moving house, Terry once again bites off more than he can chew.

programme.title: Terry and June
programme.desc: Terry gets into a lather when a new carpet fails to arrive in time for a visit from his boss. The neighbours help him precipitate disaster.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Edinburgh, October 1977: Christine Eadie and Helen Scott vanish without a trace. The police never stopped hunting for justice, even changing the law to bring justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Tracie Andrews purportedly witnessed the murder of her boyfriend, Lee Harvey, in a country lane on the night of 1st December 1996; but all was not what it seemed.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: In late 1992, an attack led to an investigation which would last nearly a quarter of a century. Over time, DNA profiling helped to close a case which detectives feared would never be solved.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: David Jackson left his home to buy beer and cigarettes. He was never seen again. For 15 years his disappearance remained unsolved, until one investigator broke the case wide open.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The murder of Lynette White led to the longest murder trial in British history at the time. Find out how police work and DNA eventually led police to her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Rachel O'Reilly was savagely murdered in her home, in what looked like a burglary gone wrong. A ground-breaking investigation finally put her killer behind bars.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A popular, healthy, 60-year-old woman suffered a sudden, painful death. Detectives managed to trace the killer, despite their calculated and elaborate web of deceit.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A killer, who stalked and gained his victim's trust, enticed her to her death. Almost two decades later scientific advances brought the perpetrator to justice.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: A man returning from a family visit stops to help what appears to be a stranded group on the Belt Parkway in Brooklyn, NY. Half an hour later, he is found dead.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: Laura Garza told friends she was going on a night out at the Marquee Club. When she didn't show for work the next day a search ensued to find her as well as the men she left with.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation into the brutal murder of Shelby Weatherly, and how the police caught her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The investigation to catch a serial rapist and how advanced DNA technology finally tracked him down.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: The story of a double-homicide and how dedicated police work, alongside forensics, solved the case.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: How investigators uncovered what happened in the moments leading up to the death of Jchandra Brown.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: When David Castor was found dead, an extensive police investigation - fuelled with the power of forensics and toxicology - uncovered another victim.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 22nd December 1979, Phyllis Murphy disappears after doing some Christmas shopping. When she doesn't come home, her family fear the worst, but it's not until a month later in the Wicklow Mountains that her body is discovered.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 31st July 2003, a woman was reported missing after she hadn't been seen or heard from in over a week. Police suspected foul play and after an intensified search, they tracked down her killer.

programme.title: Evidence of Evil
programme.desc: On 28th February 2001, the body of a woman was found at the bottom of the stairs of her home in North Dublin, Ireland. What initially looked like an accident, soon turned into a murder investigation.

programme.title: South Park: Something You Can Do With Your Finger
programme.desc: Something You Can Do With Your Finger: Cartman is convinced that his dream is a sign from God, so corrals the boys into making a boyband called "Fingerbang". He's not happy when Wendy joins! (S4, E08)
programme.sub-title: Something You Can Do With Your Finger

programme.title: South Park: Preschool
programme.desc: Pre-School: The boys are pooping their pants after hearing that Trent, a notorious bully from their pre-school years, is being released from juvenile hall - guess who put him there? (S8, E10)

programme.title: South Park: Quest for Ratings
programme.desc: Quest For Ratings: When the gang's school news programme trails far behind Craig's show, "Animals Close-Up With a Wide-Angle Lens", they pledge to boost their ratings - how far will they go? (S8, E11)

programme.title: South Park: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset
programme.desc: Stupid Spoiled ***** Video Playset: Paris Hilton opens a store in South Park, corrupting the town's girls in the process. It's up to Mr Slave to put things right - time for a "***** off!" (S8, E12)

programme.title: South Park: Cartman's Incredible Gift
programme.desc: Cartman's Incredible Gift: Cartman jumps off his roof while wearing cardboard wings and ends up in a coma. When he awakens he believes he has psychic powers - and the police believe it too! (S8, E13)

programme.title: South Park: Woodland Critter Christmas
programme.desc: Woodland Critter Christmas: Stan finds talking animals building a Christmas tree in the woods. They enlist him to protect them from an evil mountain lion but things aren't what they seem. (S8, E14)

programme.title: South Park: Timmy 2000
programme.desc: Timmy! 2000: The boys copy Timmy's behaviour (who has ADD) in order to get out of doing homework. Timmy is heading for rock stardom - but not if Phil Collins has anything to do with it! (S4, E03)

programme.title: South Park: City on the Edge of Forever
programme.desc: City On The Edge Of Forever: The school bus ends up perched on the edge of a ravine after it crashes in a snowstorm. Must be time for some flashbacks then! Can these memories be trusted? (S2, E07)
programme.sub-title: City on the Edge of Forever

programme.title: South Park: Mr. Garrison's Fancy New Vagina
programme.desc: Mr Garrison's Fancy New Vagina: Mr Garrison has a sex change, Kyle has an unusual operation to make him tall and athletic enough to play basketball and Kyle's dad has "dolphinoplasty"!?! (S9, E01)

programme.title: South Park: Die Hippie, Die
programme.desc: Die Hippie, Die: Cartman runs a 'pest control' service to rid the town of hippies and is soon arrested, but when a plague of hippies invades South Park the town turn to him and his methods. (S9, E02)

programme.title: A Haunting: Mind Control
programme.desc: When William falls ill, Amanda Morrison's family volunteer to clean his home. But after the family stumbles across satanic objects in the home, strange things start happening. A demonologist cleanses the home and discovers the reason behind the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: Tunnel Of Death
programme.desc: Candace and John St. Clair explore a haunted tunnel with a gruesome history where slaves were buried alive. Stealthily, an uninvited guest follows them home. Attacked by the entity, they invite paranormal experts to investigate and cleanse the home.

programme.title: A Haunting: Dark Dreams
programme.desc: A nightmare starts when Chris starts renovating his family dream house. A ghost haunts the home. Only with the help of paranormal investigators, priests, psychics, and shamans does Chris figure out a way to protect his family and "evict" the evil spirit.

programme.title: A Haunting: Ghost Confessions
programme.desc: An unknown entity appears to find pleasure in terrifying 17-year-old Macy Sherman, her younger sister Kelsey and their mom Carrie. The family reaches out for help, praying that they can get rid of the spirit intent on staying in their home forever.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hidden Terror
programme.desc: After Mike and Lisa move in their new house, Lisa’s personality begins to change dramatically.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon Whispers
programme.desc: When Phil Pritchard’s beloved father dies, he falls into a deep depression that renders him vulnerable to an unearthly evil that begins influencing him and will stop at nothing to render him a pawn in its relentless thirst for misery and murder.

programme.title: A Haunting: Black Magic
programme.desc: During the renovation of her 150-year-old Pennsylvania home, Debbie Guy accepts the old house has a ghost and they will have to live with it. But when family members are tormented by an evil entity, Debbie seeks the help of paranormal investigators.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes of the Past
programme.desc: The Johnson’s young daughter reveals that two fairies visit her room each night.

programme.title: A Haunting: Haunted Victorian
programme.desc: After moving in their dream home, Edwin Gonzalez and Lillian Otero begin to experience strange occurrences; mysterious footsteps and unexplained noises. Lillian is physically attacked while sleeping and the couple tries to escape, but is it too late?

programme.title: A Haunting: Phantom Room
programme.desc: Shari and Erol find the perfect California home to raise Shari’s two young daughters. When they discover a mysterious secret room hidden inside their garage, it triggers a ghostly presence. Now, Shari knows she must do something to protect her daughters.

programme.title: A Haunting: Curse Of The Mummy
programme.desc: On a visit to an exhibit of ancient Egyptian artifacts, Caleb Weaver experiences a chilling encounter with an unwrapped mummy and unleashes the wrath of a vile beast. Now stronger and more furious than ever, it seeks to possess Caleb.

programme.title: A Haunting: Echoes from the Grave
programme.desc: Ron and Nancy learn their house is a way station between life and death.

programme.title: A Haunting: Demon's Revenge
programme.desc: Tiffany McKinnon, her boyfriend and his 7-year-old daughter move into a 200-year-old farmhouse Franklin, VA. Tiffany discovers that the spirit of a freed slave is haunting the home and is determined to make peace with him.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Wheatsheaf Horror
programme.desc: New owners of the Wheatsheaf Pub find bits of clothing and bones behind the walls.

programme.title: A Haunting: Evil Never Dies
programme.desc: Jennifer Hoke’s family found their dream home along the waterfront in Florida; little do they know something dark is lurking in their dream house. What starts as strange noises escalates to physical attacks. The family turns to a local empath for answers.

programme.title: A Haunting: Hell House
programme.desc: Bonnie and her family buy a farmhouse and they sense that they are being watched.

programme.title: A Haunting: Untouchable
programme.desc: After her mother, Linda, returns from a routine overseas trip to India, Kara Dravis begins experiencing unexplained and terrifying events in their home. Linda and Kara turn to a clairvoyant in hopes she can find a resolution to the haunting.

programme.title: A Haunting: The Calling
programme.desc: Rebecca hears spirits but is able to ignore them until one emerges who refuses to be ignored.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A look at British killer Dennis Nilsen who was known to dress and watch TV with his victims' corpses. Having crammed human remains into his drains, his crimes were discovered by Dyno-Rod.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Robert Napper wreaks terror on south London, murdering two women and a child.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Gerald and Charlene Gallego join forces to rape and murder several teenagers.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Clues to serial killer doctor Harold Shipman's crimes could be found in his background. After being convicted of the murders of 15 elderly patients, it is believe the true number of victims could be as high as 275.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Between 1975 and 1981, the Yorkshire Ripper murdered 13 females and brutally attacked at least seven more in the north of England. When Peter Sutcliffe was eventually captured, his family were stunned.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the mid-1970s, the north of England was terrorised by a vicious criminal known as the Black Panther. Among hundreds of burglaries and armed robberies, several sub-postmasters were shot dead.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In the 1970s, charming New Jersey resident Robert Reldan abducted and brutally murdered two young women, escaping suspicion for a long time.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: A profile of one of Britain's most notorious serial killers, looking for insights into his horrific behaviour and why Fred West, owner of 25 Cromwell Street turned to murder.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Richard Cottingham murdered at least six people and dismembered his victims' bodies.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Examining the `Highway Hooker', a female serial killer and prostitute sentenced to death by lethal injection for the killing of six men in Florida between 1989 and 1990.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1979, a violent and unpredictable crime spree rocked the town of Richmond, Virginia. Men, women and children were butchered in their homes and on the streets, and the perpetrators were a gang for whom violence ran in the family.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 1999, Carole Sund, her 15-year-old daughter Juli and Juli's friend Silvina Pelosso disappeared from Yosemite National Park, California.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: The detectives, attorneys and psychiatrists who tried to unravel the mystery of why so many young people fell under Manson's spell, and how he was able to convince them to kill innocent people.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: This edition reviews the case of Levi Bellfield who murdered three women, including Milly Dowler.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In 2002, two gunmen terrorised the American capital with random fatal shootings. A look at if their appetite for murder was innate or learned.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Documentary profile of Patrick Mackay, once dubbed the most dangerous man in Britain. In the mid 1970s, London and the south-east was gripped by a series of bizarre murders.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: In California in 1970, a doctor and his young family were executed and dumped in the swimming pool of their hilltop home. The killer was a reclusive 24-year-old who believed that he was on a mission from God.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: Cinema entrepreneur Peter Moore brutally murdered four men in Wales in 1995.

programme.title: Born to Kill?
programme.desc: When investigators in Maryland identified cross-dressing eccentric Hadden Clark as the killer of six-year-old Michelle Dorr and Harvard graduate Laura Houghteling, he not only confessed but claimed that he was also responsible for many other deaths.

programme.title: The Captive Heart
programme.desc: An imprisoned Czech captain (who impersonated a dead Englishman) must convince British POWs that he is not an enemy spy.

programme.title: Blithe Spirit
programme.desc: A widower's second marriage is complicated by his first wife's disruptive ghost. Based on the play by Noel Coward.

programme.title: Boys in Brown
programme.desc: A slice of life in a British Borstal reform institution for young criminals.

programme.title: Conspiracy of Hearts
programme.desc: A group of nuns at a convent during World War II help Jewish children escape from a Nazi transit camp.

programme.title: Danger Within
programme.desc: British soldiers search for the spy in their midst as they plan a daring escape from a World War II POW camp.

programme.title: The Day Will Dawn
programme.desc: A British journalist working in Norway finds himself hunted by the Germans when he uncovers a secret U-boat base, while the daughter of a Norwegian sea captain helps the Brits combat the Nazi menace.

programme.title: Clockwise
programme.desc: An obsessively punctual school headmaster sets out to give an important speech to a conference of headteachers. However, the day goes from bad to hideously awful when he boards the wrong train.

programme.title: A Cuckoo in the Nest
programme.desc: Leaving to join his wife at a party in the country, Peter misses his train through chatting to an old friend, Marguerite. The two are forced to stop at an inn which only has one room left. But unknown to Peter, he is being pursued by his in-laws!

programme.title: A Cup of Kindness
programme.desc: Two newlyweds are accused of fraud after holding their nuptials despite objections from their feuding families.

programme.title: On the Night of the Fire
programme.desc: A barber gives in to temptation and commits a theft, stealing some money from another shopkeeper, which leads to his involvement in blackmail and murder.

programme.title: Don't Ever Leave Me
programme.desc: Jack's grandfather Harry comes out of prison and stays with him in his mews flat.

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Denese and her mom return because they know Dejon fathered Denese’s daughter! Plus, Rebecca has been here 6 times for 7 DNA tests and returns for her 8th and 9th tests!
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister's Boyfriend My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 7 Babies. 8 Men. Who's the Father?
programme.desc: These moms are desperate to find their children's missing fathers. But these denying dads say that there's no way they're the real fathers. When the DNA results are revealed, who will be proven right and who will be still searching for answers?

programme.title: The Maury Show: He's My Husband Now. Not Your Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: These guests say they're positive they know the true identity of the father of their children, but they just need a DNA test to prove it. Now the results are about to be revealed, but will they be the results they were hoping for?
programme.sub-title: He's My Husband Now. Not Your Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated with 97 Women. Will My Fiancé Forgive Me?
programme.desc: Did Rey cheat on Ashley while she was pregnant with his baby and have a secret threesome behind her back? Plus, Jason is worried that his uncle is paying his fiancé to sleep with him. His uncle has a shocking confession that you have to see!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated with 97 Women. Will My Fiancé Forgive Me?

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Maury Show
programme.desc: It’s a Spring Wild Safari Spectacular on today’s MAURY! Jungle Jack Hanna joins Maury to share some of the most amazing animals we’ve ever seen! Your whole family will want to tune in to watch this amazing episode of MAURY!

programme.title: The Maury Show: We Had A Threesome…But I'm Not Your Baby's Dad!
programme.desc: These couples decided to have a threesome which ended up in a pregnancy. Now that the babies are born, these men deny they are the fathers. Today they will be forced to face the truth.
programme.sub-title: We Had A Threesome…But I'm Not Your Baby's Dad!

programme.title: The Maury Show: You Have 11 Kids…The DNA Will Prove It!
programme.desc: Teen mom Casie is dead set on proving Casey is the dad. Is Dirk the father of Brooke’s baby? Which brother fathered Miranda’s baby? Brandon denies both of Me'Chelle's kids but even his mother is on Me'Chelle's side!
programme.sub-title: You Have 11 Kids…The DNA Will Prove It!

programme.title: The Maury Show: The Test Doesn't Lie…Today You Are Busted!
programme.desc: Has Antonio been cheating on Chasity since their wedding day? Is Mike sleeping with his wife Lisa’s mother? Jackie swears Danny is cheating and he swears she is…Maury’s got all of the results!
programme.sub-title: The Test Doesn't Lie…Today You Are Busted!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Teen Moms…Shocking Paternity Test Results!
programme.desc: You are the father! You are not the father! No one does paternity like MAURY and today's stories will not disappoint!

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Daughter Sleep With My Man?
programme.desc: The guests on today’s MAURY have secrets to reveal, but will they regret ever bringing them up? Relationships are on the line. Hearts may be broken. Can these couples survive the secrets that threaten to tear them apart? Find out on today’s MAURY!
programme.sub-title: Did My Daughter Sleep With My Man?

programme.title: The Maury Show: 10 Moms. 12 Kids. Who’s The Dad? Part 1
programme.desc: We’ve got so much paternity action we can’t fit it all in one show. “You Are the Father” could be the sweetest words these men could ever hear. Will the results be make our guest cheer or tear?
programme.sub-title: 10 Moms. 12 Kids. Who’s The Dad? Part 1

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Had a Threesome…Who's My Baby's Dad?
programme.desc: Rhonda is positive that John is the father of her child. Even John’s mother agrees with her! Then, Kim and Heather used to be best friends. But that was before Rick left her for Heather. But Kim is sure that Rick fathered her baby. What is the truth?
programme.sub-title: I Had a Threesome…Who's My Baby's Dad?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?
programme.desc: Is Jesus the father of Laicie’s baby? Dusti says he’s gay and sex with Kayla was an “experiment”, but did he father her child? Is Rick or Jesse the father of Jolene’s baby?
programme.sub-title: Did My Husband or Lover Father My Kids?

programme.title: The Maury Show: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?
programme.desc: Sherry has a shocking secret to tell her boyfriend. But the secret involves his childhood best friend. Jen says that her husband is a cheater and has proof! Will these relationships survive?
programme.sub-title: Is My Sister Sleeping With My Man?

programme.title: The Maury Show: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!
programme.desc: Two steaming grandmothers want to sort out their children's paternity mystery. Then, Ben is sure that Angela's child is his. Teen mom Melissa wants Izzy to admit he's the dad and support her!
programme.sub-title: I Cheated... Our Kids May Not Be Yours!

programme.title: The Maury Show: They're Back: Feuding Family Updates!
programme.desc: Some of our wildest guests return to give us some updates. Did the DNA results force these denying dads to step up? Did the lie detector results force these cheaters to become faithful?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Jalen is convinced that his girlfriend, Sade, had sex with members of his family as well as his friends! Then, Javon claims that his father, Jim, disappeared early on in his life. But 20 years later, Jim has resurfaced and now wants to reconnect.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: I Already Took A Lie Detector Test / Is It Too Late To Be Your Father?

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On today's Karamo, Stephen received a random call from a woman claiming that his girlfriend, Martina, was having sex with her man. Next, Shannon and Latoya are best friends that have two out of control daughters.
programme.sub-title: DNA: The 3 Kids Aren't Mine! / Out Of Control Teens

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Today on Karamo, Brittany says she can't be in the same room with another man without being accused of cheating by her fiancé, K'Wasi. Next, Ebony's boyfriend Johnny is non-stop with his accusations of her cheating. He's even set hidden cameras up.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Is It More Than Flirting? / DNA & Unlock: Your Insecurity Is Ruining Our Family

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: On an all new Karamo, Naomi's boyfriend, Jae, left her while she was two months pregnant because his family started rumors about him not being the father! The relationship is in a tailspin and has even escalated to domestic abuse.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: You Called The Cops On Me

programme.title: NEW Karamo
programme.desc: Theisa claims that her husband vanishes at all hours of the night. Next, Kimaya says her father Marvin degrades her. Kimaya's mother, Tamika, believes that Marvin is suffering the effects of childhood trauma.
programme.sub-title: Unlock: Who Is Calling In The Middle Of The Night? / Dad, Unblock Me' Please!

programme.desc: A 50 ton construction machine and the 20 ton trailer carrying it land in a stream.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 11
programme.desc: A 50-ton construction machine is stranded by a severely-damaged Victorian bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 12
programme.desc: A recovery crew work to rescue an articulated lorry that fell down a 20-metre embankment.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 13

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 14

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 15

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 18

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 19

programme.desc: Recovery op Steve must deal with a mattress-stuffed lorry which has hit a low bridge.

programme.title: Trucking Hell: Episode 6
